pageContext.name: Professor of Archeology
pageContext.description: 'It's not the years, honey, it's the mileage.   Sideshow and ACME Archives are pleased to present the Professor of Archeology Fine Art Lithograph by Eric Elia!  This Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark-inspired print comes hand-numbered and with a certificate of authenticity.   Indy fans and Fine Art collectors, be sure to add the Professor of Archeology print to your Indiana Jones gallery today!
